name: wilson-bash-guard
description: Deny catastrophic Bash commands at the PreToolUse layer — pipe-to-shell from a network downloader (curl|sh), `rm -rf` of a root/home path, fork bombs, disk destroyers (dd of=/dev/disk, mkfs, >/dev/sd*), and recursive chmod 777 on / ~ or `.`. High-confidence destructive patterns only — near-zero false positives. Complements wilson-git-guard (force-push) and wilson-dangerous-path (protected-path writes). Opt out: SIDECAR_NO_BASH_GUARD=1.
